vocab.database: Firestore (NoSQL). Collections → Documents → Fields. addDoc/setDoc/updateDoc/deleteDoc from firebase/firestore.
vocab.realtime: onSnapshot(query, callback) for live updates. Unsubscribe by calling the returned function in cleanup.
vocab.authentication: getAuth(). signInWithPopup for OAuth. onAuthStateChanged listener. currentUser for session check.
vocab.storage: getStorage(). ref(storage, path). uploadBytes then getDownloadURL. Security Rules for access control.
vocab.query: query(collection, where('field','==',value), orderBy('field'), limit(n)). Compound queries need composite indexes.
